sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Chubb은 2025년 3분기 핵심 영업이익이 30.9% 증가한 주당 7.49달러를 기록하며 견조한 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 핵심 영업이익은 전년 동기 대비 28.7% 증가한 30억 달러를 기록하며 사상 최고치를 경신했습니다.
손해보험(P&C) 부문은 81.8%의 합산비율을 기록하며 사상 최고의 언더라이팅 수익인 22억 6,000만 달러를 달성했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 손해보험 순보험료는 129억 3,000만 달러로 5.3% 증가했으며, 북미 지역의 개인 보험과 상업 보험 부문이 각각 8.1%, 3.5% 성장했습니다.
분기 중 세전 재해 손실은 2억 8,500만 달러로 전년 동기 7억 6,500만 달러 대비 크게 감소했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 순이익은 28억 달러(주당 6.99달러)로 전년 동기 대비 20.5% 증가했습니다.
연환산 핵심 영업 자기자본이익률(ROE)은 16.3%, 핵심 영업 유형자기자본이익률(ROTE)은 24.5%를 기록했습니다.
주당 장부가치와 유형 장부가치는 전 분기 대비 각각 4.7%, 6.6% 상승하여 182.22달러와 120.13달러에 도달했습니다.

watchItems.text: 북미 상업 보험 부문의 성장세가 일회성 요인을 제외하고도 지속 가능한 수준인지 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 d65750dex991.htm EX-99.1 EX-99.1 Exhibit 99.1 Chubb Limited Bärengasse 32 CH-8001 Zurich Switzerland www.chubb.com @Chubb News Release Chubb Reports Third Quarter Net Income Per Share of $6.99, Up 22.6%, and Record Core Operating Income Per Share of $7.49, Up 30.9%; Consolidated Net Premiums Written of $14.9 Billion, Up 7.5%; Record P&C Combined Ratio of 81.8% ● Net income was $2.80 billion, up 20.5%, and record core operating income was $3.00 billion, up 28.7%. ● P&C net premiums written were $12.93 billion, up 5.3%. North America was up 4.4%, including growth of 8.1% in personal insurance and 3.5% in commercial insurance, or 6.2% adjusting for the impact of two non-recurring items that benefited 2024. P&C current accident year underwriting income excluding catastrophe losses was a record $2.18 billion, up 10.3% over prior year, with a combined ratio of 82.5%. ● Total pre-tax catastrophe losses in the quarter were $285 million compared with $765 million last year, and $2.56 billion for the nine months compared with $1.78 billion last year. ● Total pre-tax favorable prior period development was $361 million compared with $244 million last year. ● Life Insurance net premiums wri  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.26 billion = 22억 6,000만 달러; $2.18 billion = 21억 8,000만 달러; $285 million = 2억 8,500만 달러; $765 million = 7억 6,500만 달러; $2.56 billion = 25억 6,000만 달러; $1.78 billion = 17억 8,000만 달러; $361 million = 3억 6,100만 달러; $244 million = 2억 4,400만 달러; $324 million = 3억 2,400만 달러; $765 = 765달러; $1.93 = 1.93달러; $1.78 = 1.78달러; $361 = 361달러; $244 = 244달러; $324 = 324달러; $1.65 = 1.65달러.

n on tangible equity (ROTE) was 24.5% and annualized core operating ROE was 16.3%. ZURICH – October 21 , 2025 – Chubb Limited (NYSE: CB) today reported net income for the quarter ended September 30, 2025 of $2.80 billion, or $6.99 per share, and core operating income of $3.00 billion, or $7.49 per share. Book value per share and tangible book value per share increased 4.7% and 6.6%, respectively, from June 30, 2025 and now stand at $182.22 and $120.13. Book value was favorably impacted by after-tax net realized and unrealized gains of $884 million in Chubb’s investment portfolio. Book value per share and tangible book value per share excluding AOCI increased 2.8% and 3.8%, from June 30, 2025. Chubb ® , Chubb logo ® and Chubb. Insured.
